_note: Box API credentials are required to connect to Box Online. See README.md for setup instructions.

box._help: Create a Box App at https://app.box.com/developers/console to get these values.
box._folder_id_note: Use '0' for your root Box folder, or paste the numeric ID from the Box folder URL.

watsonx._help: IBM WatsonX.AI credentials — get these from cloud.ibm.com > Manage > Access (IAM) > API Keys and your WatsonX project.

groq._help: Groq API — free at console.groq.com. Runs Llama 3.3 70B instantly. Fallback when watsonx is not configured.
